raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 67,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bes teem Kalpeem/ un
alponehm/ to paſchu bija ſeptin
hſtoſchi/ trihſfunts/ trihſdef-
its un ſeptini. Un teem bija
wiſiunis/ tſchetrdſmitis un pee-
Dseedataji un Dseedatajas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 68,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winno Sirgu ſeptin-
nts/ trihſdefmitis un ſechi.
Winno Sirg-Ebſektu diwiſimts
chetrdſmitis un peezi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 69,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Rameetu tſchetrfmits/
ihsdefmitis un peezi; fechtuhk-
ofchi/ ſeptinsmits un diwideſ-
its Ebſeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 70,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un zitti no teem angſteem
ehweem dewe pee ta Darba/
tirſatus dewe pee Mantas/
hſſtochas Drakmas Selta/
ezdefmitis Beſkenus/ un pee-
nts un trihſdefmitis Peeſteru-
wahrkus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 71,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un (wehl zitti) no teem
igſteem Tehweem dewe pee
antas/ us to Darbn/ diwideſ-
its tuhkſtochas DrakmasSel-
/ un diwi tuhkſtochus un di-
fints Mahrzinus Sudraba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 72,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ko tee zitti Laudis de-
/ tas bija diwideſmitis tuhk-
schas Drakmas Selta/ un di-
tuhkſtochi Mahrzini Sudra-
/ un ſechdefmitis ſeptini Pree-
ru-Swahrki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 73,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Preesteri/ un Le-
ti/ un Wahrtu-Sargi/ un
feedataji/ un (zitti) no teem
udim/ un tee Netinim/ un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wits Jsraelis dſihwoja fauog
Pilsfahtos.
Ta VIII. Nodalla.
Efrus tas Raksta-Mahzitojs laſa to Bauſli-
bas Graſmatu wiſſeem faudim dſirdoht: r-
Iſſahſta to: 8. Eepreezina tohs/ ka arrö
Neemijus: 9. Un tee Leeewnu-Swehtki
tohp turreti: 13.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nu tasſeptihts Meh-
nes atgabje/ un tee J-
sraëta Behrni faueſ
Pilsjahtos btja/ tad ſapulzina-
jahs wiſi Laudis/ ka weens wee-
nigs Wihrs/ uhſto Geln preeſſch
Uhdenſ-Wahrtim/ un ſazzija us
Eſru/ to Raksta-Mahzitaju: Ra
tam bij atnest to Graſmatu tahs
Bauſlibas Mohsus/ ko tas
KUNGS Israëtam btja pa-
wehlejts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Efrus tas Preesteris
atneffe to Bauſlibu preeſſch tahs
Draudſes/ tik labbi Wihreem/
ka Seewahn/ un wiſſeem/ kaſ
peeprattigi bija ſcho dſirdeht/pir-
mâ Deenâ/ſeptitâ Mehneti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un laſſija eekſch tahs us to
Gelu/preeſſch Uhdenſ-Wahrtim/
no patt Gaſmas lihds puſs
Deenai/ preeſſch Wihreem un
Seewahn/ un ſaprattigeem/un
wiſſo Lauschu Aufis (greesehs)
uhs to Bauſlibas Graſmatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Efrus/ tas Raksta-
Mahzitajs stahweja us augſtu
Rohka Krehtlu/ ko tee btja tapetz
darriſchi/ un fahnis winan stah-
weja Matatijus/ un Semus/un
Anajus/ un Urijus/ un Iſſijus/
un Maſſejus/ pa winna labbas
Rohkas. Un pa winna kreifas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
